column1: OPENCLAW Reference Architecture: OpenClaw (Early Feb 2026 Edition, Opus 4.6) I asked OpenClaw with opus 4.6 to deep dive into its source code and create a detailed architecture document. I like the output for this and I think others could find use for it since I didn't see it described in this detail so far. Roy Osherove 24 Feb 2026— 15 min read
